mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id = #{favId}
DELETE FROM favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT f.id as favId, f.product_id as productId, p.name as title, p.price, p.original_price as oldPrice, p.rating, p.sold, p.tags, p.activity_label as promo, (SELECT url FROM product_media WHERE product_id = p.id ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) as cover FROM favorites f JOIN products p ON f.product_id = p.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
